item.title: History
item.description: And yet, the majority of Iranians will welcome Americans into their homes with loving grace. The late Anthony Bourdain said it best: "You tend to kill your guests with kindness around here," emphasizing the overabundance of homecooked meals offered and the overwhelming warmth of strangers. It's a level of hospitality he compared to all his years of travelling.
item.dc:creator: unwaver

item.title: Morpheus is looking for The One
item.dc:creator: HotCoffee9520

item.title: Wednesday MEME DUMP To Make You Laugh #811
item.description:
1
2. When the Elote is too good
3. What gender is that
4. Comedian working the crowd
5. Stroke had I
6. Being me IRL be like
7. Star Wars deleted scene
8. Me when I go to a foreign restaurant and have no idea how to eat the food
9
10. Mouse survival strat
11. These filter photos are getting wild
12. She literally doesn't give a fuck and was tired of the snake's BS
13
14. Now that's a talented girl!
15. Thank you for making it to the end of this dump, I hope you were thoroughly entertained! I would like to share with you that I'm making a realistic bodycam-style psychological horror game, based on one of the most disturbing real life experiments in history. You are tested by a mysterious figure. Trough your choices the game explores themes of obedience to authority, cruelty and necessary moral dilemmas Please wishlist if it is something that interests you: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment/ Thank you for supporting indie devs!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Tuesday clear
item.dc:creator: crashoutbabeyoudeserveit

item.title: The 527th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2025 ep 17 - TRANS TUESDAY
item.description:
Just 5 Dump Days left of SUPER GAY MEEMAYS!
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you either when I post or when I go Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse (The Stable) and PotatoCheesMonk's (Deviousness) Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays. https://discord.gg/JoinTheStable https://discord.gg/Deviousness These are both VERY safe places for LGBTQIA+ people, if you need a community, please stop in! AbbiiStabbii's server is also amazing, *especially* safe for Trans folk. @PlanckEraWasMyBestEra also has a server for Parents who are Trans https://discord.me/transparents
OC (Note: You don't always have to wear this, this is just your battle gear)
(It's either a Blåhaj or a brick)
But you're gonna wear a spinny skirt, right? Blåhaj will be Life Guard.
Unless you want them to be a good person and they're Elon.
Pants are almost as bad as Nazis. Pants are basically Leg Nazis. There. I said it.
YES
Well obviously if it's really fun you can do it.
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.dc:creator: IDontBreakHeartsIDestroyThem

item.title: Please Help my Wonderful Wife
item.description:
This is Keisha, she suffered a massive heart attack last Friday, died once and was thankfully brought back but is on critical life support. She is currently on intubation and ECMO to recover from a pulmonary embolism. All she wanted was to correct a 20 year old ACL injury in her knee that had kept her from being active and was causing her hip pain, so she got the surgery to graft a portion of her knee tendon to replace her torn ACL. Unfortunately she was incredibly unlucky to form clots thats traveled to her lungs and hospitalized her. I want everyone who sees this post to know a little about my wonderful partner in life. She's an optician at a vision center, but has wore many hats, once being a pharmacy technician and a phlebotomist. She's a wonderful artist who likes to crochet, paint, pin bugs and do all kinds of creative things. Her favorite game series is Animal Crossing, enjoys shows like the x files, murder she wrote, and likes to watch automotive youtube channels where they revive junky old cars and tractors. Her favorite genre of books is classic scifi and her favorite genre of movies is classic action films. She is my everything, and im devastated and very scared, I didnt want to set up a go fund me or anything like but my sister law did it and theres no reason to not accept help from people who mean well. So if you want to consider helping us raise money for what will inevitably be a huge medical bill please consider donating here. https://www.gofundme.com/f/keishas-fight-overcoming-a-heartbreaking-crisis?attribution_id=sl:7116e414-eb78-4706-9ed0-bd624d1737fc&lang=en_US&ts=1750806758&utm_campaign=fp_sharesheet&utm_content=amp13_t1-amp14_t2-amp15_t1&utm_medium=customer&utm_source=copy_link&v=amp14_t2
I dont want to be one of those people who post a picture of my wife in a hospital bed with all the life support attached to her, she wouldn't want to be seen that way. So here's a lovely picture of us at a dinner train. I just want to hear her voice again.
item.dc:creator: AgentPaperCraft

item.title: I had to get new clothes - because she said yes to a 2nd date!

item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 524
item.description:
1
2
3
4
5
6
7
8
9
20
11
12
13
14
15
16
17
18 There is, but it'd be funny.
19
20
21
22
23
24
25
Man Tax: Jacob Hankin “Reputation is what other people know about you. Honor is what you know about yourself.” ― Lois McMaster Bujold, A Civil Campaign I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting on it, maybe let it go, don't comment on it and find something that you do like. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server so you guys can donate memes to the museum for future CCC posts. I don't want to run out! Also, we can hang out, play some trivia, talk about movie & tv. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ If there's an AI image or two in my posts, give me a break on it. I don't post them intentionally.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: None of us have met my mother though. She’s the missing link.
item.description:
MRW I find out I have a new uncle!!
MRW he tells me a lot of them were adopted out and they are trying to find everyone. Then I realize it confirms that my mom was actually a scoop victim.
But I happen to be driving through the city my new uncle lives in this weekend. I’ve asked if he’d be comfortable meeting at Tim Horton’s. MRW I’m waiting for a response…
item.dc:creator: MadameRainbowPants

item.title: Celebrating Pride Month - Day 24
item.description:
Happy Pride Month! Each day in June, I’ll be sharing the story of one LGBTQ+ person whose life and work helped shape our world. From activism to art, science to culture, let’s honor the brilliance, resilience, and humanity of our community.
Live Long And Prosper
item.dc:creator: noelle78

item.title: Ludicrous Speed scene from Spaceballs in Intergalactic Quality
item.description: Source: Spaceballs #IntergalacticQualityGifs (Check WiFi) Intergalactic Fact dump about this scene: Plaid Effect Creation: The iconic “plaid” effect when Spaceball One exceeds light speed was achieved through practical and visual effects. The VFX team at Apogee, led by Grant McCune, used a combination of motion control photography and custom filters to create the checkered pattern. Mel Brooks reportedly came up with the plaid idea himself, wanting a visual that was absurdly literal to top “Ridiculous Speed.” Rick Moranis’ Improvisation: Rick Moranis, as Dark Helmet, improvised some of the scene’s funniest moments. His line, “What’s the matter, Colonel Sandurz? Chicken?” was unscripted. Sound Design: The sound effect for Ludicrous Speed was a custom creation by sound designer Gary Rydstrom. The sound team used exaggerated, cartoonish effects to match the visual gag of the ship overshooting Planet Druidia. Set and Props: The Spaceball One bridge set was built with a mix of practical and matte-painted elements to mimic the Death Star’s control room. The “Ludicrous Speed” button and control panels were deliberately over-the-top, with oversized levers and flashing lights to enhance the parody. The coffee stain on Dark Helmet’s console (visible when he’s drinking) was an intentional detail to mock sci-fi’s typically pristine aesthetics. Mel Brooks added uncredited voice effects, including a faint “whoosh” sound, to enhance the Ludicrous Speed transition.
item.dc:creator: BabyFarkMcGeeZax

item.title: Trans Girl Tuesday
item.description:
Kirk Virtudazo Popiolek Hello lovely lads, lasses and enbys! It's been a while but it didn't seem right to let pride month slide by without a TGT post! All your love and support matters more than ever with the fascists closing in on us!! Special shoutout to the newest member of the club: Trisha, I'm glad you found your way!! I hope it's going the way you hoped, it's a heck of a ride! 115th ed.
Carolina Gutierrez
Nofar Ashbel
Daniielle Alexis
Jan Brielle
Jan Brielle https://www.instagram.com/reel/C7yHPkNoPzf/
Kirk Virtudazo Popiolek
This is the future republicans fantasize about.

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
